description_long: This is a modern, medium-sized utility helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent main rotor system. The body is primarily painted in a light gray or white color, with visible markings and a side door for crew or passenger access. The helicopter features a four-blade main rotor and a four-blade tail rotor mounted on the vertical stabilizer, both of which are dark in color. The landing gear consists of robust, retractable wheels rather than traditional skids, indicating suitability for both urban and rugged environments. The cockpit is equipped with large, multi-pane windows that provide excellent visibility for pilots, and the tail section is angular with a horizontal stabilizer. Markings such as 'NAVY' and a registration number are visible on the tail boom, suggesting a military or governmental use.
description: A modern, light gray utility helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, retractable wheeled landing gear, and large cockpit windows. Markings and a side door are visible, indicating military or governmental use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the helicopter, main and tail rotors, side door, and visible 'NAVY' marking.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cockpit windows, nose, and the alignment of the main rotor blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail rotor, landing gear, and additional markings on the tail boom.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail rotor, tail boom, and the symmetry of the main rotor blades.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, dark gray or black in color, with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Four-blade tail rotor mounted on the vertical stabilizer, oriented perpendicular to the tail boom, dark in color with no visible markings.
attribute_landing_skids: Not present; the helicopter uses retractable wheeled landing gear with visible struts and wheels.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple large, angular cockpit windows with clear glass, black framing, and a wraparound design for wide visibility.
attribute_registration_number: Visible on the tail boom: 'NAVY' and '610'.
